description: Create a Print Template for the Quotes module named 'MSA Contract' using the text from ~/Documents/Master_Service_Agreement_Template.txt. Map the placeholders [ORGANIZATION NAME], [QUOTE NUMBER], and [GRAND TOTAL] to their respective Vtiger merge fields (Account Name, Quote Number, and Grand Total). Generate a PDF for the quote 'Q-Enterprise Server Deployment' using this template and save the output to ~/Documents/Enterprise_MSA.pdf.
